name: templates/split
description: Two-column slide template for a visual plus supporting points.

usage: Paste snippet HTML inside .ls-deck and copy its registryDependencies before use.

composition.copyGuidance: Put a real visual, diagram, or key statement in the panel column and 2-3 supporting cards in the stack.
avoidWhen: there is no real visual or anchor content for the panel column

alternatives.when: the slide is a plain list of short points

useCases: Explain one concept with a visual plus supporting points.
